## Example

```esql
TS k8s
| STATS max_rate=MAX(RATE(network.total_bytes_in)) BY time_bucket = TBUCKET(5minute)
```

| max_rate: double | time_bucket:date |
| --- | --- |
| 64.5 | 2024-05-10T00:20:00.000Z |
| 22.359074 | 2024-05-10T00:15:00.000Z |
